title: Duck Deep Action Gel Toilet Cleaner Liquid, Removes Limescale, Long Lasting Fragrance, Pine Forest, 750ml
features: Toilet Duck Deep Action Gel Pine 750ml
description: Product Description Toilet Duck Deep Action Gel Pine 750ml Ingredients Barley, Wheat Directions 1. Lift the toilet seat 2. To remove the cap, squeeze the two textured side surfaces and unscrew completely 3. Tip bottle to fill neck 4. Direct liquid under the rim and squeeze evenly around the bowl 5. Brush above and below the water line, then flush 6. Replace cap and close tightly until an audible click is heard 7. For stubborn stains, allow product to sit for several minutes Where to use: Toilets Safety Warning Contains l-(+)-lactic acid 2.02% (2.02g/100g). Keep out of reach of children. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. IF SWALLOWED: Call a POISON CENTRE or doctor if you feel unwell. As with any household product avoid prolonged skin contact with this product. For use only in toilet bowls. Do not mix with bleach or any other household cleaners. Manufacturer Contact Information Toilet Duck Deep Action Gel Pine 750ml See more

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Store in a cool place. Best Before End (BBE): see one end of tray.
